acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, the app is 100% free, contains no ads, and provides full AI-powered dream analysis without hidden costs.

mainEntity.name: How safe is my dream data?

acceptedAnswer.text: Your privacy is our priority. All dream data stays on your device; there is no cloud requirement or data tracking.

mainEntity.name: How does the AI dream analysis work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Dreamzzz uses advanced AI models to interpret your dreams based on psychological methods like C.G. Jung and Sigmund Freud.
